channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Pauline Hanson's Stance on Immigration and Deportations: Key Insights from UK Visit
item.description: Pauline Hanson, leader of One Nation, has expressed strong support for mass deportations during a recent UK trip, claiming Australia's immigration policies have led to significant challenges. During a...

item.description: A retired senior naval officer is facing a secret military disciplinary process over unspecified allegations involving lucrative defence contracts in Western Australia. The inquiry, which involves a c...

item.title: Iran-Iraq Conflict Escalates as Missiles Target Jordan and Threaten Regional Stability
item.description: The article details the escalating conflict between Iran and Israel, with Iran launching missiles toward Jordan and warning of potential spillover into Israeli territory. The U.S. military conducted a...

item.title: Students' Hunger Strike in Delhi Sparks Demand for Government Dialogue
item.description: A group of citizens has written to Prime Minister Narendra Modi, urging him to engage in dialogue with students who have been on a hunger strike at Jantar Mantar in Delhi since June 28. The protest, l...

item.title: Kakamega Leaders Vow to Prevent Vote Division Ahead of 2027 Election
item.description: Kakamega politicians, led by Cooperatives Cabinet Secretary Wycliffe Oparanya, have vowed to block attempts to split Luhya votes ahead of the 2027 general election. During a rally in Shinyalu constitu...

item.title: NBI maintains focus on SEA Games corruption investigation amid political tensions
item.description: The National Bureau of Investigation (NBI) has reiterated its commitment to probing alleged corruption in the 2019 Southeast Asian Games despite Senator Alan Peter Cayetano's recent derogatory remarks...

item.title: Twisted Sister's New Vocalist: Fan Reaction and Band's Decision

item.title: Canada's World Cup Celebration Concludes with Final Match Between Spain and Argentina
item.description: The World Cup soccer final between Spain and defending champion Argentina is set to take place in Toronto and Vancouver, marking the end of Canada’s month-long hosting role in the tournament. Fans are...

item.title: Fox News Host Mocked for Confusion Over Iran's Military Response Despite Trump's Claims
item.description: The article discusses Fox News host Maria Bartiromo's confusion over Iran's military capabilities following U.S. strikes in July 2026. Despite President Donald Trump's repeated assertions that Iran's ...

item.title: India's privacy concerns over WhatsApp's username feature spark global debate
item.description: The Indian government's objection to WhatsApp's username feature has raised global concerns about privacy and censorship. WhatsApp introduced usernames to allow users to chat without sharing phone num...

item.description: A Tanzanian youth footballer has made history by winning the Gothia Cup under-17 title in Sweden, marking a significant achievement for Tanzanian sports. The victory, celebrated as a milestone, highli...

item.title: No Winners in Major Lotto Draws on July 19, 2026
item.description: On Sunday, July 19, 2026, the Philippine Charity Sweepstakes Office (PCSO) announced that there were no winners for the Ultra Lotto 6/58 and Superlotto 6/49 games. The Ultra Lotto jackpot had reached ...

item.title: Umahi Denies Foul Play in Death of Nurse Found at Staff Guest House, Calls for Independent Autopsy
item.description: Minister of Works David Umahi has publicly addressed the death of 26-year-old nurse Mary Habila, whose body was discovered in a guest house within his residence in Uburu, Ebonyi State. He said Habila ...

item.title: British Steel Nationalisation Sparks Compensation Claims and Diplomatic Tensions
item.description: The UK government has nationalised British Steel, prompting the Chinese firm Jingye Group to demand full compensation through legal means. The decision came after Jingye announced plans to close the S...

item.title: Current AI launches open-source AI infrastructure to empower global communities
